publishedAbstract: OCP4.14 brought GA support to use ODF with Multus, customers who were reluctant to activate Multus with ODF are now interested in adopting this feature. The process of moving ODF to use Multus is a one way street, once we move from vanilla network (ovn-k8s) to Multus we can’t revert to ovn-k8s. To move back to ovn-k8s the whole ODF storage cluster needs to be deleted and re-deployed which will incur total loss of data.
publishedTitle: Migrating ODF from ovn-kubernetes to Multus
